verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who is this that appears like the dawn Fairer than the moon, brighter than the sun You're the lover of my soul Draw me into You, draw me into You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who is this that beckons me to come close Beauty beyond words surrounds me when You're near You're the lover of my soul Draw me into You, draw me into You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We will run, we will fly, we will be together We will laugh, we will cry, we will be together

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who is this that wipes the tears from my eyes Just one glimpse of You steals my heart away You're the lover of my soul Draw me into You, draw me into You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We will run, we will fly, we will be together We will laugh, we will cry, we will be together

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Draw me into You, draw me into You
